# claudeplatform_workspaces (Data Source)

All workspaces in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claudeplatform_workspaces" "all" {
  include_archived = false
}

output "workspace_names" {
  value = [for w in data.claudeplatform_workspaces.all.workspaces : w.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `include_archived` (Boolean) Include archived workspaces.

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `display_color` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
